top_signals.title: Canada to spend $1.4 billion on armored combat support vehicles built locally
top_signals.summary: Canada is significantly expanding its armored fleet with a new contract to acquire 190 combat support vehicles over the next four years.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Executive Vice-President Virkkunen and Commissioner McGrath on the Rule of Law Report
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 Executive Vice-President Virkkunen
